summary: Successfully tested both new features: PDF export functionality and Bangladesh/Myanmar monitoring regions. Backend API tests show 100% success rate (49/49). Frontend testing confirmed all new UI elements and integrations work correctly.
passed_tests: PDF Export API endpoint returns valid PDF with correct headers
Daily Brief page has both Export PDF and Regenerate Brief buttons
Bangladesh and Myanmar appear in Intelligence Feed state filter
New threat categories (Political Developments, Foreign Power Influence, Military Operations, Economic/Trade) in filter
NER Map shows Bangladesh and Myanmar as clickable regions
Cross-Border page displays 30 results from Bangladesh and Myanmar sources
Dashboard stats show live data (not zeros)
All backend API endpoints functioning correctly (49/49 tests passed)
